Chapter 12 Sections 5 & 6
Chapter 14 Section 4
Select the "Take the Quiz" button to complete this 20-question quiz on the grammar concepts covered in this module.

Please only attempt the quiz after completing the weekly readings, lectures, and assignments. TWO attempts are provided for the quiz, questions are randomized in each attempt, and the highest score will be awarded in the grade book. The exam is timed, you are allowed 2 minutes per question.

Time for Completion
You have 20 minutes to complete each attempt.

Click Next to read the Week 2 Summary.


Week 2 | Summary
Summary
This week, we discovered the world of storytelling, recognizing the power each of us holds to write impactful narratives. We started by exploring the essence of a powerful story—what it means and how it forms the bedrock of an extraordinary essay. We questioned whether our individual statements were clear and comprehensive enough to support a compelling essay, considering the inclusion of sub-topics that convey our messages effectively or share life's valuable lessons. We emphasized the importance of expressing unique perspectives in our narratives.
